text.title: Market Sizing with AI Research Tools Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Pitch deck TAM = $50B from one Gartner report; investors discount the slide.
antipattern.fix: Add bottom-up + value-theory estimates; show all three.

antipattern.symptom: Market sizing slide presents 2022 numbers as 2026 reality; off by 2x.
antipattern.fix: Set recency_filter='year'; flag any figure older than 2 years.

antipattern.symptom: Three methods produce 5x spread; report shows only the highest.
antipattern.fix: Show all three; add reconciliation section explaining spread.
